title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0262
summary: 1 Plaintiff, a railroad brakeman, brought this action under the Federal Employers' Liability Act, 35 Stat. He recovered a jury verdict of $24,990, but the Circuit Court of Appeals reversed because of errors in the charge by the District Judge and ordered a new trial, 3 Cir., 162 F.2d 832.
